nasb.text: But have nothing to do with worldly fables fit only for old women. On the other hand, discipline yourself for the purpose of godliness;

esv.text: Have nothing to do with irreverent, silly myths. Rather train yourself for godliness;

cnv.text: 總要棄絕世俗以及老婦的無稽之談；要操練自己達到敬虔的地步。

ccb.text: 但你要弃绝世俗、荒诞的传说，要训练自己做个敬虔的人。

csbs.text: 至于那些不敬神的、像老妇人所编造的故事，你要拒绝。为了敬神，要操练自己，
